title: pay.json v1.2
description: Machine-readable pricing manifest for AI agents. Declares payment terms and accepted facilitators for web content and services.

receiver.description: Ethereum address that receives payments. In a no-splitter architecture this equals seller_wallet.

seller_wallet.description: Ethereum address of the content seller — ultimate beneficiary of the payment.

facilitators.description: Ordered list of facilitators the publisher accepts. Agents SHOULD attempt them in array order and fall back through the list on failure. When omitted or empty, agents fall back to their built-in default stack.

priority.description: Optional priority tier. Lower numbers are preferred. Equal priorities MAY be load-balanced.

spec_version.description: x402 spec version this facilitator implements. Agents SHOULD use this to pick the correct payment header (V1: X-PAYMENT, V2: PAYMENT-SIGNATURE).

verifier.description: Optional verifier endpoint URL. When present, agents MAY query this endpoint to verify settlement after payment (independent of the facilitator). Used by the Xenarch commercial layer for signed receipts.

contact.description: Optional contact information for the publisher.

terms.description: Optional URI to terms of service.

tools.description: Optional tooling hints for agents — CLI install commands, SDK packages, and documentation.

install.description: Shell command to install the CLI.

usage.description: Example command to pay for a URL.

sdk.description: SDK package identifiers keyed by registry (e.g. npm, pypi).

rules.description: Pricing rules mapping URL path patterns to prices.

price_usd.description: Price in USD as a decimal string (e.g. "0.01").

terms.description: What the price buys — billing model and unit.

type.description: Billing model. Common values: per_use, per_minute, per_request, subscription, per_unit. Consumers MUST tolerate unknown values by treating as per_use.

unit.description: Free-form unit label for per_unit pricing (e.g. "1000_tokens", "image").

quantity.description: Quantity included per payment when relevant.

budget_hints.description: Advisory agent spending caps for this rule.

recommended_max_per_call.description: Suggested per-call cap in USD as a decimal string.

recommended_max_per_session.description: Suggested per-session cap in USD as a decimal string.
